div.head:
No. 614
Editorial Note
div.p: On November 12, the United States and Japan signed at Tokyo a Charter Party Agreement for the lease by the United States to Japan of seven patrol frigates. For text, see 3 UST (pt. 4) 5183.
Documents concerning the negotiation of this Agreement are principally in files 794.562 and 794.5621 for 1952.
